name: mn-team-onboard
description: Onboard a new team to the MN Service (Meeting Notes) n8n pipeline from a team tag + parent Drive folder link. Creates the Drive subfolders via a token-protected n8n webhook, adds one routing entry to teamsRaw (Stage then Prod), self-validates with rollback, and reports.
requirements: **n8n MCP** + **Google Drive** connector + webhook token in `plugins/mn-team-onboard/.env` (see `config/.env.example`).
